3266350.name: Back Alley Darts
3266350.description:
Back Alley Darts is a crowd-play game designed Back Alley Darts Game experience.

The aim of the game is to try and get a bulls eye or the hiest points going and be the top of the leaderboard. The more points you get the better it is as you will unlock stuff in the game to be able to use in the game so different flights , Different darts and much more.

Twitch streamers share the gameplay with their followers, interacting through chat and video. This is a gaming collision of Back Alley Darts and custom flights and custom back alleys and social video streaming at its finest, with a growing collection of playable Darts and Back alleys and custom dart boards.

****Twitch interactive game and twitch is required to play the game****

****We are making the game work with youtube but will not be ready on release day will update here when its ready****
3266350.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
